title: rubus carpinifolius subsp. empelios
intro: Rubus carpinifolius subsp. empelios is a subspecies of blackberry native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its unique leaf shape and fruit color. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Rubus carpinifolius subsp. empelios are believed to provide various health benefits, including the relief of digestive issues, reduction of fever, and support of the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a sought-after ingredient in natural remedies and traditional medicine.
